title: Upload & Processing
author: Author
authorPlaceholder: Leave blank to auto-detect from file metadata
duplicateTitleWarning: A book titled "{{title}}" already exists — this upload will still proceed.

dropzone.dragText: Drag file here, or click to select
dropzone.errorInvalidFormat: Please upload a PDF, DOCX, TXT or EPUB file
dropzone.errorTooLarge: File exceeds the {{max}} MB size limit
dropzone.errorOneFileOnly: Only one file can be uploaded at a time

review.title: Review Chapter Structure
review.subtitle: Review chapter structure · last human gate before submitting
review.splitBanner: New paragraph split off at selection — use the "＋" between paragraphs to start a chapter here
review.submitBanner: Review submitted — the pipeline continues downstream analysis.
review.discardConfirm: Delete the whole book and discard this upload? This cannot be undone.
review.errorLoad: Failed to load chapter data. Please try again later.
review.errorSubmit: Submission failed. Please try again later.
review.spineSummary: {{total}} paras · {{body}} body / {{nonBody}} non-body · click a block to jump
review.railHint: Chapter length by paragraph count (click to jump)
review.infoRow: Set chapter roles in the left spine, paragraph roles via the menu on each paragraph's right · role definitions in the guide on the right
review.roleTooltipChTitle: Chapter role (applies to the whole chapter)
review.suggestRolesHint: Uses AI to scan the book's opening and closing paragraphs for non-body matter (copyright/contents/preface/afterword/bio…). Consumes tokens.
review.aiScanBanner: AI is scanning inward from the first and last pages, classifying body / non-body…
review.aiDoneBanner: AI split off non-body chapters at the edges — please review. These are suggestions only; press "Submit review" to apply.
review.suggestError: Detection failed. Please try again later.
review.glossaryToggle: Not sure which chapter or paragraph role to pick? Open the guide
review.glossaryIntro: A book is made of "chapters"; each chapter's role decides whether the whole chapter enters the reader and analysis: non-body chapters (contents, preface…) are excluded wholesale and their paragraphs are never read. "Paragraph" roles only take effect inside body chapters, marking in-chapter exceptions (e.g. a paragraph that is actually an epigraph) — so set the chapter role first; there is no need to tag paragraphs inside non-body chapters.

chDesc.body: The story itself — appears in the reader and enters all analysis (characters, events, timeline…).
chDesc.toc: A table of contents or chapter list; not narrative, excluded from body analysis.
chDesc.preface: An author's or publisher's preface — introductory, not the story itself.
chDesc.afterword: A closing afterword or author's note — supplementary text outside the story.
chDesc.other: Copyright page, author bio, and other non-narrative matter.

paDesc.body: A narrative paragraph, treated as the main subject of reading and analysis.
paDesc.separator: A scene or viewpoint break (e.g. ＊＊＊) with no narrative content.
paDesc.section: An in-chapter subheading or divider — structural text, not narrative.
paDesc.epigraph: A quotation or maxim at a chapter's head — not the story, usually kept.
paDesc.preamble: A short lead-in or note before a chapter — not formal story content.
